title: thymus fallax var. balansae
intro: Thymus fallax var. balansae, also known as the Balansae thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus fallax plant, a type of low-growing, shrubby perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thymus fallax var. balansae include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Thymus fallax var. balansae is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
